credit_gate: Red build: do not spend Meshy credits. The OpenAI part sheet contradicts the required mechanical decomposition.

meshy_policy.hard_stop: Stop: current OpenAI sheets are red evidence and may not be used as Meshy inputs.

red_build.expected_visible_state: isolated crop-ready parts: hull shell only, turret only, mantlet/barrel only, gear/wheel only; no complete tank and no tracks on the hull part
red_build.actual_visible_read: part sheet shows a mostly assembled tank/chassis with tracks and road wheels, plus separate turret, barrel, and wheel; style atlas contains text artifacts and spelling errors
visible_mismatch: hull candidate includes track/chassis/running gear mass
part sheet is not crop-safe for independent Meshy hull generation
style atlas has baked text labels and typo artifacts
the sheet invites another fused or mechanically wrong Meshy spend
red_build.blocked_next_action: No Meshy generation from these images.
red_build.required_next_artifact: new part sheet must show isolated orthographic components with hull shell only and no text artifacts before any Meshy call
